mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) total_members,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetings WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) total_meetings,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reports WHERE status="PENDING") pending_reports,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sports) total_sports
SELECT user_id,login_id,nickname,role,status FROM users ORDER BY user_id DESC
SELECT m.meeting_id,m.title,m.status,u.nickname host_nickname FROM meetings m JOIN users u ON m.host_user_id=u.user_id WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.meeting_id DESC
SELECT report_id,reason,status FROM reports ORDER BY report_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reports SET status=#{status}, processed_at=NOW() WHERE report_id=#{reportId}
